message:
refactor(tests): migrate tantivy_ingest, workflows, storage, pool from tokio::test to runtime_compat (ft-e34d9.10.2.3.1)

Convert 226 #[tokio::test] async tests across 4 files to #[test] with
run_async_test helper backed by runtime_compat::RuntimeBuilder:
- tantivy_ingest.rs: 46 tests
- workflows/mod.rs: 59 tests
- storage.rs: 69 tests (across 5 test submodules)
- pool.rs: 52 tests

This completes the migration of all non-runtime_compat source files in
frankenterm-core/src/. Only runtime_compat.rs retains #[tokio::test]
intentionally as it IS the runtime abstraction layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
